title: nephrodium chrysocoma
intro: Nephrodium chrysocoma, also known as the golden fern or lady fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium chrysocoma include its ability to help relieve coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium chrysocoma include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
